name: Sailor Moon x RWBY: Story
description:
Disclaimer: Don't forget to follow me or you're bald... 😂🤌

Just kidding... Anyways this is obviously a roleplay of Sailor Moon and you can write your own story, even ocs and crossover is all allowed. You heard me? ALL ALLOWED. Because you can do whatever you want from it. Roleplay? Heck yeah! Fanfics? Heck yeah! Want an average chat? Hell fucking yeah! Everything you can and now write a story where it all starts! :))

Just a pic for you 😁
